expectations.evidence: 18 ACs numbered AC-1 through AC-18, organized by Happy Path, Error Handling, Edge Cases, Authorization.
AC-1 (headers on every response), AC-2 (standard within limit), AC-3 (premium headers), AC-4 (premium within limit)
AC-13: 'When the Retry-After value has elapsed, Then the next request succeeds'
AC-3, AC-4, AC-6, AC-16 all cover premium tier behavior
AC-1 lists all three headers. AC-3 covers premium headers.
AC-8: 'When 30 seconds pass and 40 of the original requests fall outside the 1-minute sliding window, Then the next request succeeds'
AC-7: 'response status is 401 Unauthorized, And no rate limit headers are included'
18 distinct ACs defined, including idempotency (AC-14), tier change (AC-17), revoked key (AC-18).
